case_title: GATES, TWYLA vs. AVILLA, LOUIS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GATES, TWYLA AS TO DEFENDANT AVILLA, LOUIS ALNEIDA, ANDREIA S. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-02-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-01-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-12-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OR FOR A SIGNED ORDER TO PUBLISH. HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS PER JUDGE QUIDACHAY, DEPT 2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GATES, TWYLA

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 1/6/97: FOR PROOF OF SERVICE BY PUBLICATION. APPEARANCE REQUIRED IF NOT FILED BY 2/7/97. HEARING SET FOR FEB-19-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-19-1997, CONTINUED TO MAY-20-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OF PUBLICATION PLUS DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
